title: 水果最小因果编码结构协议
master_equation: h_concept ~= B_global + B_family + E_concept + sum(A_attr) + sum(G_bind(concept, attr_i)) + C_context + eps
focus_case_equation: h_apple ~= B_global + B_fruit + E_apple + A_red + A_sweet + G_bind(apple, red) + G_bind(apple, sweet) + C_context + eps

component_rows.role: carry noun-like shared structure across families
component_rows.causal_prediction: ablating this term should damage noun identity broadly, not only fruit concepts
ablating this term should remove fruitness while preserving some local apple residue

component_rows.role: separate apple, banana, pear, orange within the same family
component_rows.causal_prediction: ablating only this term should collapse instance identity toward generic fruit

component_rows.role: carry reusable attribute directions such as red, sweet, sour, round
component_rows.estimation: shared mean(h(attr + object)) - mean(h(object)) over multiple objects
component_rows.causal_prediction: injecting this term should transfer partially across compatible objects

component_rows.role: bind object and attribute into a valid combination
component_rows.estimation: h(object, attr) - [B_global + B_family + E_concept + A_attr + C_context]
component_rows.causal_prediction: ablating this term should preserve object and attribute traces but break their composition

component_rows.role: condition the whole representation on sentence frame, task, negation, discourse, and style
component_rows.estimation: residual after matched-frame substitution and context-controlled averaging
component_rows.causal_prediction: replacing context should move this term strongly even when object and attribute stay fixed

estimation_steps.name: matched_prompt_inventory
estimation_steps.goal: build balanced prompts for fruit identity, attributes, and context frames
examples: The orange is on the table.

estimation_steps.name: family_backbone_estimation
estimation_steps.goal: estimate B_global and B_fruit from balanced noun pools

estimation_steps.name: attribute_channel_estimation
estimation_steps.goal: extract reusable color, taste, shape, and texture channels

estimation_steps.name: binding_residual_estimation
estimation_steps.goal: estimate G_bind as the non-additive composition remainder
equations: G(apple, red) ~= h(red apple) - [B_global + B_fruit + E_apple + A_red + C_context]
G(banana, sweet) ~= h(sweet banana) - [B_global + B_fruit + E_banana + A_sweet + C_context]

estimation_steps.name: causal_projection
estimation_steps.goal: project each component back to neuron, head, and residual candidates
equations: retain units that are stable across prompts and causal under ablation/injection

intervention_rows.expected_effect: apple/banana/pear/orange lose fruit-family similarity and generic fruit readout
intervention_rows.failure_mode_if_not_seen: family backbone is not a useful causal object

intervention_rows.expected_effect: apple drifts toward generic fruit but should not fully become animal or tool
intervention_rows.failure_mode_if_not_seen: apple identity is not localized to a compact family-internal offset

intervention_rows.expected_effect: redness should transfer partially to compatible objects such as apple, car, flower
intervention_rows.failure_mode_if_not_seen: attribute channels are not reusable across objects

intervention_rows.expected_effect: apple and red traces remain but the red-apple composition weakens strongly
intervention_rows.failure_mode_if_not_seen: binding is close to pure addition rather than a causal bridge

intervention_rows.expected_effect: same apple concept moves under recipe/news/poetry/negation frames
intervention_rows.failure_mode_if_not_seen: context term is overestimated or not separable

prediction_rows.predicted_form: h_apple ~= B_global + B_fruit + E_apple + A_red + A_sweet + A_round + G_bind(apple, attrs) + C_context
prediction_rows.expected_generalization: should be predictable from fruit family backbone plus a compact concept offset

prediction_rows.predicted_form: h_banana ~= B_global + B_fruit + E_banana + A_yellow + A_sweet + A_long + G_bind(banana, attrs) + C_context
prediction_rows.expected_generalization: should be predictable from fruit family backbone plus a compact concept offset

prediction_rows.predicted_form: h_pear ~= B_global + B_fruit + E_pear + A_green + A_sweet + A_soft + G_bind(pear, attrs) + C_context
prediction_rows.expected_generalization: should be predictable from fruit family backbone plus a compact concept offset

prediction_rows.predicted_form: h_orange ~= B_global + B_fruit + E_orange + A_orange + A_citrus + A_round + G_bind(orange, attrs) + C_context
prediction_rows.expected_generalization: should be predictable from fruit family backbone plus a compact concept offset

success_criteria: B_fruit ablation hurts fruit-family predictions far more than matched non-fruit controls.
E_apple ablation weakens apple specificity while preserving a generic fruit trace.
A_attr transfers across compatible objects but not uniformly across incompatible ones.
G_bind ablation breaks composition more than either object-only or attribute-only ablation.
The same decomposition predicts held-out fruit prompts and held-out attribute combinations.
falsifiers: Fruit-family ablation has no stronger effect than random matched ablation.
Concept offsets are as large as the family backbone and do not cluster within the family.
Attribute directions fail to transfer outside the source noun.
Composition is explained almost perfectly by additive terms and leaves no stable binding residual.
Context replacement dominates all other terms and destroys decomposition stability.
core_answer: 苹果的神经元级编码不应再被理解成单个神经元标签，而应被重建成‘水果家族骨干 + 苹果概念偏置 + 可复用属性通道 + 组合绑定桥接 + 上下文修正’的最小因果结构；同一套结构也应能外推出香蕉、梨、橙子的编码。
